summary: Tested Soul Made Products feature fixes: 1) SoulMadeCollection correctly shows products for user's pet breed (Indie for Mojo), 2) No 'Could not load personalized products' error when logged in, 3) TheDoggyBakery products in separate section from Soul Made products, 4) Breed exclusion pattern working in /api/products endpoint

console_warnings.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded - occurring repeatedly on CelebratePage when logged in. This is a performance issue that causes many failed resource loads
console_warnings.recommendation: URGENT: Fix useEffect dependencies to prevent infinite re-renders. This is causing the page to consume excessive resources and slow down.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error in CelebratePage.jsx - causing performance issues and resource exhaustion
The breed-specific product fix is working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CelebratePage.jsx has infinite re-render issue (Maximum update depth exceeded) - needs immediate attention to fix useEffect dependencies
SoulMadeCollection.jsx line 361: has_mockup filter correctly removed, products show even without mockups

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core functionality working but performance issues due to infinite re-render

context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Made feature is working. Backend breed exclusion pattern working correctly. Frontend loads but has 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error causing performance issues. User pets: Mojo (Indie), Mystique (Shih Tzu). Shih Tzu mockups were generated (11 products).

soul_made_collection_shows_correct_breed.evidence: Made for Mojo section shows Indian Pariah Dog (Indie) products with mockup images

no_could_not_load_error.evidence: No 'Could not load personalized products' error visible on page when logged in

shopify_products_separate_from_soul_made.evidence: TheDoggyBakery section (Artisan Cakes & Treats) is clearly separated from Soul Made products section

breed_exclusion_in_api.evidence: Backend test verified: /api/products does not return any products with breed names in format 'Breed · Product'

shih_tzu_mockups_generated.evidence: Backend API returns Shih Tzu products with mockup_url field populated

indie_products_have_mockups.evidence: Indie products displayed with actual mockup images on frontend

pet_data_correct.evidence: API returns Mojo (Indie) and Mystique (Shih Tzu) with correct breed information

features_verified.SoulMadeCollection.jsx: Shows personalized products for logged-in user's pet breed without has_mockup filter
features_verified.server.py breed_exclusion_pattern: Line 7088 - correctly excludes breed-specific products from /api/products endpoint
features_verified./api/mockups/breed-products: Returns breed-specific products with mockup URLs for both indie and shih_tzu breeds

maximum_update_depth.description: CelebratePage.jsx causes infinite re-render loop leading to 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error and net::ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors
maximum_update_depth.impact: Page eventually loads but with significant performance degradation and many failed resource requests
